name: s3
title: Amazon S3
description: Create a storage from an Amazon S3 Bucket.

name.label: Name
name.description: A name to identify this storage.

account.label: Account
account.description: The Amazon AWS account with which to access the resources.

_bucket.description: The Amazon S3 Bucket name and it AWS Region, e.g. eu-west-1.

root.label: Root
root.description: The default remote path that will be used as the storage root, e.g. /layouts.

writable.label: Write Permission
writable.text: Grant write permissions for this storage.
